prompt: Create a cinematic lifestyle portrait of a young East Asian woman leaning peacefully on a riverside bridge railing during golden hour. She has a short black bob haircut with soft wind-blown strands, delicate facial features, fair skin, and round clear eyeglasses. She is looking slightly upward with her eyes gently closed and a subtle relaxed smile, conveying quiet peace and solitude. She wears an oversized light gray chunky cable-knit sweater with long sleeves covering part of her hands, plus a small delicate necklace. Her arms rest casually on a weathered wooden bridge rail, with metal vertical railings receding into the distance on the right. The background shows a calm river reflecting warm sunset light, a softly blurred urban skyline with tall buildings, and a distant hill with a slender tower, all in creamy bokeh. Use warm backlighting, soft rim light on her hair and sweater, shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, realistic photography, 85mm lens look, cinematic color grading, serene atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
